diagrams.title: 2-to-1 Multiplexer Symbol and Circuit
diagrams.description: Shows the block diagram symbol and gate-level implementation of a 2:1 MUX
diagrams.purpose: Understanding basic MUX structure and Boolean expression derivation

diagrams.title: 4-to-1 Multiplexer Block Diagram
diagrams.description: Functional block diagram of 4:1 MUX showing all inputs, select lines, and output
elements: Four data inputs: I0, I1, I2, I3
diagrams.purpose: Understanding multi-input MUX selection mechanism and truth table mapping

diagrams.title: MUX as Function Generator
diagrams.description: Shows how a MUX can implement Boolean function F(A,B) = A + B'
elements: Variables A, B connected to select lines
Data inputs set to 0, 1, B, or B'
diagrams.purpose: Learning to use MUX for combinational logic implementation
